name: Scalloped Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a frying pan, sauté celery, onion, and garlic in butter until tender.
3. Blend in flour.
4. Add remaining ingredients, except Parmesan cheese and half of the toast cubes.
5. Place mixture in a 1-quart casserole dish.
6. Sprinkle remaining toast cubes and Parmesan cheese over the top.
7. Bake for 25 minutes until topping is brown and mixture is bubbling.
